list.name: norad
list.query: SELECT norad::text FROM satellite ORDER BY norad

panels.title: Orbit altitude (from position cache — live for every satellite)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, alt_km AS altitude FROM position WHERE norad = $norad ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, field AS metric, value_num AS value FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad AND (field = 'battery_v' OR field ~* '(volt|vbat|v_bat|bat[a-z_]*_v$|panel_v$)') AND value_num BETWEEN 0 AND 60 ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, field AS metric, value_num AS value FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad AND field ~* '(temp|bat[a-z_]*_t$)' AND value_num IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, field AS metric, value_num AS value FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad AND (field = 'battery_i' OR field ~* '(current|curr|_i_|amp)') AND value_num BETWEEN -20 AND 20 ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (field) field, COALESCE(value_num::text, value_txt) AS value, ts FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad ORDER BY field, ts DESC
SELECT ts AS time, value_num AS value FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad AND field = 'battery_pct' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Battery vs orbital sunlight — position+telemetry fusion

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, value_num AS battery_v FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad AND field = 'battery_v' ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, (CASE WHEN sunlit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float AS sunlight FROM position WHERE norad = $norad AND sunlit IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, count(DISTINCT ts)::float AS frames FROM telemetry WHERE norad = $norad GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
